# oms-demo

Trigger: /oms-demo [project-slug]
         /oms-demo (from inside project directory)

What it does:
- Walks all done UI tasks in the most recent milestone on the live deployed URL
- Records VIDEO of each multi-step flow (record:start / record:stop)
- Executes every Scenario GIVEN/WHEN/THEN from the task spec against the live URL
- Posts narration + screenshots to Discord milestone thread
- Outputs CEO-readable health summary (terminal + Discord)

When to use:
- After /oms-work milestone gate passes
- When CEO wants to see what shipped on the live URL
- Before milestone sign-off / next milestone planning

Does NOT:
- Run automated tests (that is oms-work milestone gate)
- Modify code or fix issues found
- Re-run failed oms-work tasks

Requires:
- Browse daemon (auto-started by skill)
- Live deployed URL (Vercel production, Railway, or staging)
- Done tasks in cleared-queue.md for the milestone
- Discord channel_id in oms-config.json

Output:
- qa/videos/demo-[milestone]/  — video per flow
- qa/screenshots/demo-TASK-NNN-*.png — screenshots per state
- Discord milestone thread: per-task results + screenshots + health summary
- Terminal: same health summary

Model: Sonnet only. Browse requires multi-step tool chains — never route to qwen/haiku.
